static_grid_removed.evidence: Old static SVG/grid is absent from active /workflow HTML

five_stage_flow.evidence: Input / Understand / Model / Decide / Learn stage containers exist

required_nodes.evidence: All required node groups are rendered

feedback_loop.evidence: Explicit feedback loop and restrained animation exist

concept_first_default.evidence: Default mode is Simple and conceptual labels exist

acronyms_secondary.evidence: Acronyms are secondary and hidden by default Simple mode

main_support_distinct.evidence: Primary path and support systems are visually distinct

status_encoding.evidence: ACTIVE / COMPLETED / WAITING / DEGRADED / FAILED / NOT_USED styles exist

node_interaction.evidence: Node selection, dependency highlighting, and dimming are implemented

inspector.evidence: Context inspector includes required sections and collapsed technical detail

simple_expert_modes.evidence: Simple and Expert modes exist and persist preference

latest_full_modes.evidence: Latest Tick and Full Architecture modes exist and persist preference

keyboard.evidence: Enter / Space select and Escape clears selection

bilingual.evidence: Chinese and English strings exist for core workflow controls

zoom_fit_reset.evidence: Zoom In / Zoom Out / Fit / Reset controls exist

e2e_artifacts.evidence: 24-step E2E result and final screenshot artifacts exist
